Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IndustriesSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IndustriesSettings
public class IndustriesSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for IndustriesSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IndustriesSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="allowMultipleProducersToWorkOnSamePolicy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="appointmentDistributionOrgPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
